entries.decision: Bootstrap project structure for Synthesis hackathon, Agents that Trust track
Implement AgentIdentityRegistry with register/endorse/reputation/deactivate + trust SDK scaffold
Deploy AgentIdentityRegistry to LUKSO mainnet
Build React/Vite frontend — agent directory, profile pages, dashboard
Complete trust SDK with endorse(), register(), typed errors, validation, retry, verifyBatch
Expand test coverage from 24 to 45 Foundry tests + 23 SDK integration tests against live mainnet
Comprehensive security review of both contracts
Add Endorse page, About page, trust score visualization, demo script for judges
Add AgentTrust high-level class wrapping all SDK operations
Deploy UUPS upgradeable proxy pattern for future-proof upgrades
entries.safety_check: Verified proxy admin and implementation slot before announcing

entries.decision: Build Envio indexer for fast on-chain queries — AgentRegistered, EndorsementGiven, ReputationUpdated events
D3 trust graph visualization — force-directed graph with endorsement edges
Add AgentSkillsRegistry — separate contract for on-chain skill registration
Build automated keeper for Base token holder reputation boost + decay logic
entries.safety_check: Dry-run keeper on testnet before scheduling live cron

entries.decision: Expand SDK test suite — 97 tests total across AgentTrust and integration
Responsive CSS, touch targets, code block overflow fixes across all 8 pages
Multi-agent security review — 9 audit passes, multiple Medium findings fixed
Trust graph tier colors, sidebar scroll fix, UX polish
Address audit findings from multi-agent review + PR review feedback
entries.safety_check: Validated all contract changes against existing test suite before merge

entries.decision: Add /api/verify endpoint + Foundry CI job in GitHub Actions
Redeploy AgentIdentityRegistry with onlyActive guard — v4 proxy at 0x16505FeC
entries.safety_check: Verified 11 agents registered on new proxy before updating frontend
entries.retry_reason: First deploy (v5) had incorrect guard logic, redeployed as v4 with fix, then reverted to proxy with all 11 registered agents

entries.decision: Update all contract addresses across 26 files to match live deployment
Fix SDK test addresses to match on-chain state after proxy redeployment
Update proxy address to v4 across all skill files and docs
Fix CI failure — OWNER_ADDRESS in tests pointed to unregistered EOA on new proxy
entries.root_cause: 0x7315D3fa not registered on 0x16505FeC — replaced with 0x293E96eb (UP) and 0x1089E1c6 (Emmet)
entries.safety_check: Verified both addresses on-chain via eth_call before committing

safety_guardrails: All on-chain writes require explicit human approval via OpenClaw safety layer
Transaction parameters validated against expected values before every write
Contract addresses verified on-chain before test assertions
Dry-run keeper execution before scheduling live cron
Git commits never pushed from workspace root — always cd into repo directory
Credentials never committed to public repos

abort_reasons: v5 proxy deploy had incorrect guard logic — rolled back
Initial test fix used wrong DEPLOYER address — corrected
CI timeout on first Foundry run — added forge-std submodule
Rate-limited during rapid commit sequence — slowed down
